title: Wire extra-packages.yaml as Docker build source of truth
summary: Review #4 feedback addressed: pip_extras validation regex updated from '^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$' to '^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]*$' to allow PEP 508-valid hyphenated extra names. Error message updated to match. All 13 tests pass. Review pattern document and external review record added correctly.

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases covered (empty pip_packages, pattern validation for all fields)
Regex accepts valid PEP 508 extras with hyphens
Error messages reflect the actual validation pattern

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing shell test script structure pattern
Change is minimal and focused — exactly 2 lines modified in code file
Regex patterns are consistent across validation blocks (pip_extras vs pip_packages vs apt_packages each appropriately scoped to their spec)

security_checklist.item: No security-relevant changes in this diff

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is minimal — no unnecessary changes

fail_fast_checklist.item: Validation still fails fast on invalid patterns

defensive_checklist.item: grep -vE with || true still handles zero-match case correctly
